title: Command Centre alert received
message: INC-2026-00430 reports Major incident alert storm / duplicate alerts on MON-CORR-01.

payload.alert_type: Major incident alert storm / duplicate alerts
payload.current_state: 147 duplicate alerts opened in 12 minutes for the same checkout symptom.
payload.requested_outcome: Correlate duplicates, suppress child alerts, and create a parent incident.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Correlate duplicate alerts, avoid closing without parent linkage, require approval, and validate suppression.

payload.title: Alert Storm Correlation
controls: Group alerts only when symptom, CI, and time window match.
Do not bulk-close alerts without parent incident linkage.
Validate duplicate count and parent linkage.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.

items.summary: Grouped duplicate alerts into a parent MI.
Operator bulk-closed alerts without parent linkage.
items.notes: Unsafe precedent: audit trail and impact correlation were lost.

items.summary: Correlation found multiple symptoms in the alert storm.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history bulk-closed alerts; SOP requires parent linkage and scoped suppression.

blocked_precedent.summary: Operator bulk-closed alerts without parent linkage.
blocked_precedent.notes: Unsafe precedent: audit trail and impact correlation were lost.

title: Evidence summary structured
message: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for Major incident alert storm / duplicate alerts.

payload.outcome: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for Major incident alert storm / duplicate alerts.
sop_controls: Group alerts only when symptom, CI, and time window match.
Do not bulk-close alerts without parent incident linkage.
Validate duplicate count and parent linkage.
payload.governance_note: SOP beats history: HIST-CMD-2026-009 is visible as a warning, not copied into the remediation plan.

title: Safe remediation plan generated
message: Correlate duplicate checkout alerts and create a parent incident in mock mode.

payload.summary: Correlate duplicate checkout alerts and create a parent incident in mock mode.
payload.action_preview: Mock action: group 147 duplicate alerts, create parent MI, suppress matching child alerts for 30 minutes.
payload.estimated_effect: Open duplicate alerts reduce from 147 to 1 parent incident with child links preserved.
safeguards: Human approval is required before remediation.
SOP controls override unsafe historical precedent.
validation_steps: Confirm duplicate symptom and CI match.
Validate child alerts are linked, not deleted.
payload.escalation_condition: Escalate to incident commander if non-duplicate critical alerts remain.

title: Policy gate passed with approval hold
message: Policy allows planning but requires human approval before mock execution.

checks.name: Target scope
checks.message: Targets are limited to approved scenario resources.

checks.name: Dry-run guard
checks.message: Plan uses a dry-run or mock-only action preview.

checks.name: Human approval
checks.message: Human approval is required before remediation.

validation_steps: Confirm duplicate symptom and CI match.
Validate child alerts are linked, not deleted.

checks.name: Mock-only execution
checks.message: Plan is constrained to mock execution.

title: Approval package structured
message: Approve mock-only remediation for Major incident alert storm / duplicate alerts.

payload.expected_safe_effect: Open duplicate alerts reduce from 147 to 1 parent incident with child links preserved.

title: Human approval required
message: Operator review is required before mock remediation can continue.

payload.side_effects: Replay mode disables approval side effects.

title: Mock remediation executed
message: Mock correlation grouped duplicate alerts and preserved child alert evidence.

title: Scenario validation passed
message: Duplicate active alerts reduced from 147 to 0 with one parent incident and 147 child links.

payload.name: Scenario validation
payload.message: Duplicate active alerts reduced from 147 to 0 with one parent incident and 147 child links.

title: RCA and audit evidence generated
message: Monitoring correlation did not group repeated checkout symptoms quickly enough.

payload.root_cause: Monitoring correlation did not group repeated checkout symptoms quickly enough.
payload.validation: Duplicate active alerts reduced from 147 to 0 with one parent incident and 147 child links.
payload.business_impact: Enterprise Monitoring remained protected during the synthetic workflow.
follow_up: Tune correlation rule for checkout symptom.

title: Closure decision required
message: Remediation is validated. Operator can close the incident now or keep it under observation before closure.

options.label: Approve closure
options.message: Close the incident with RCA and audit evidence attached.

options.label: Observe first
options.message: Keep the incident under observation, recheck metrics, then close.

title: Incident closed
message: INC-2026-00430 was closed with RCA, evidence, and validation attached.
